TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Ci'asiroay (Posong) == O kasiikedan no niyaro' O nikalopisak no Ci'asiroay (Posong) Ci'asiroay (Posong) No i tiniay i Taitung Shi no Taitung ko Ci'asiroay a niyaro', 1,259 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 3,198 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. I 'ayaw mapatireng ko tosa kilang ko 'asiro to sahapinang ko kamalo' no niyora', o Ci'asiroay han to a pangangan. Romasato, ira ko cinganganay to Ci'asiroay a niyaro' i Donghe Siang (i Fafokod). 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,228 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,970 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 26%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Rukai 1%, Puyuma 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomi O pitooran no finawlan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) == o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) no~u i tiniaj i taito~u~uŋ sħi no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. i ʡajaw mapatirəŋ ko~u to~usa kiɾaŋ ko~u ʡasiro~u to~u saħapinaŋ ko~u kamaɾo~uʡ no~u nijo~uraʡ, o~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj ħan to~u a paŋaŋan. ro~umasato~u, ira ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ i ɬ~ɮo~uŋħə siaŋ (i fafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ). **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~u~ukai *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Ci'asiroay (Posong) == O kasiikedan no niyaro' O nikalopisak no Ci'asiroay (Posong) Ci'asiroay (Posong) No i tiniay i Taitung Shi no Taitung ko Ci'asiroay a niyaro', 1,259 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 3,198 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. I 'ayaw mapatireng ko tosa kilang ko 'asiro to sahapinang ko kamalo' no niyora', o Ci'asiroay han to a pangangan. Romasato, ira ko cinganganay to Ci'asiroay a niyaro' i Donghe Siang (i Fafokod). 38% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,228 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 62% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,970 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 26%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Rukai 1%, Puyuma 1%, Tayal 1%, roma 2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomi O pitooran no finawlan
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) == o~u kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) ʦiʡasiro~uaj (po~uso~uŋ) no~u i tiniaj i taito~u~uŋ sħi no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. i ʡajaw mapatirəŋ ko~u to~usa kiɾaŋ ko~u ʡasiro~u to~u saħapinaŋ ko~u kamaɾo~uʡ no~u nijo~uraʡ, o~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj ħan to~u a paŋaŋan. ro~umasato~u, ira ko~u ʦiŋaŋanaj to~u ʦiʡasiro~uaj a nijaro~uʡ i ɬ~ɮo~uŋħə siaŋ (i fafo~uko~uɬ~ɮ). **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~u~ukai *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, tajaɾ *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umi o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan
